name: opencoreemr/oce-module-onc-registration-tools-openemr
description: OpenEMR source tree for static analysis (PHPStan) and the local Docker bind mount. Pinned to the openCoreEMR internal core (oce-810) so analysis resolves the Symfony-Session API the module targets. Not a runtime dependency of the module — see tools/openemr/README.md. CI authenticates to the private repo via the OPENEMR_INTERNAL GitHub App (setup-private-repos action).
